production.playableLoop: Steer a delivery cart through a neon night-market kitchen lane, collect five ingredient crates, avoid sliding sauce spills, and deliver the full order to the chef counter before the timer expires.
production.objective: Collect all five ingredient crates and reach the chef counter without hitting a sauce spill.
production.progression: Sauce spills move continuously and speed up after three ingredients are loaded.
production.failRetry: A spill hit or expired timer switches to failed state; Space resets cart, crates, timer, and HUD.
feedbackMoments: HUD count increments when a crate is collected.
Cart lamp pulses while the cart moves.
Chef counter status changes when delivery is ready.

assetPlan.playerHero: Custom procedural player hero delivery cart assembled from cart body, tray, and lamp pieces.
assetPlan.obstacleEnemy: Custom procedural obstacle-enemy sauce spills with sliding wave paths.
assetPlan.rewardInteractable: Custom procedural reward-interactable ingredient crates with bobbing motion.
assetPlan.worldEnvironment: Custom world environment market lane with counters, chef station, lanterns, signs, prep boxes, and neon lighting.
assetPlan.uiHud: Structured HUD text and retained loading, pause, settings, fail-retry, win-milestone, and touch-controls states.
assetPlan.audioFeedback: Starter goal-ping asset retained for future collect/win hooks; current proof uses visual and HUD feedback.

assetSourcing: tn asset source search --game-category racing --format glb --direct-only --json returned CC0 road/truck/tent records, but they do not form a coherent sushi kitchen kit.
tn asset source search --game-category food --format glb --direct-only --json returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH.
tn asset source search --game-category environment --format glb --direct-only --json returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH.
tn asset source search --game-category collectible --format glb --direct-only --json returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH.
Fallback: cohesive procedural/custom primitive mesh kit authored in content source.

ownsState: Transform positions for cart parts, crates, and spills

proofCommands: tn game qa --project . --run-proof --url <preview-url> --entity player --press KeyD --expect-axis x --json
